description: World War II Japanese-American internment camp in California
description_wiki: Manzanar is the site of one of ten American concentration camps, where more than 120,000 Japanese Americans were incarcerated during World War II, from March 1942 to November 1945.

description: town in Tōhaku district, Tottori prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Misasa (三朝町, Misasa-chō) is a town located in Tōhaku District, Tottori Prefecture, Japan.

description: capital city of Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Hiroshima (広島市, Hiroshima-shi; English: , also UK: , US: , Japanese: [çiɾoɕima] ) is the capital of Hiroshima Prefecture in Japan.

description: Japanese era from October 1868 to July 1912
period of Japanese history from 1912 to 1926, under the reign of Emperor Taishō
country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

Angel Island may refer to:

Angel Island (California), historic site of the United States Immigration Station, Angel Island, and part of Angel Island State Park, in San Francisco Bay, California
Angel Island, Papua New Guinea
Angel Island (novel), by Inez Haynes Gillmore
Angel Island Zone, a fictional location in the Sonic the Hedgehog video game series.

description: census-designated place in Sacramento County, California, United States
description_wiki: Florin is a census-designated place (CDP) in Sacramento County, California, United States.

description: severe economic crisis in the USA in the 1930s
description_wiki: In the United States, the Great Depression is commonly (though not universally) dated to the Wall Street crash of October 1929.

description: capital city of the U.S. state of California and seat of Sacramento County
description_wiki: Sacramento is the capital city of the U.S. state of California.

description: Abrahamic monotheistic religion founded on the teachings, person and life of Jesus
description_wiki: Christianity is an Abrahamic monotheistic religion, which states that Jesus is the Son of God and rose from the dead after his crucifixion, whose coming as the messiah (Christ) was prophesied in the Old Testament and chronicled in the New Testament.

description: Evangelical Christian church and charitable organisation
city in Ventura County, California, United States
description_wiki: Oxnard ( ) is a city in Ventura County in the U.S. state of California, United States.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: consolidated city-county and capital of Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Denver  (  DEN-vər) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Colorado.

description: capital city of the United States of America
description_wiki: Washington, D.C., officially the District of Columbia and commonly known as simply Washington or D.C., is the capital city and federal district of the United States.
